MarketIntelligenceAgent.description: Responsible for conducting TAM estimation, competitor intelligence, and ideal customer segment definitions.

expected_outputs.competitor_landscape: Key local players and their positioning

ComplianceAgent.description: Responsible for legal, regulatory, data residency, and tax constraint identification across target regions.

LegalOpsAgent.description: Responsible for drafting, adapting, and redlining key customer and partner agreements (DPA, MSA, Privacy Policies).

expected_outputs.MSA_clauses: Regional clauses for Master Services Agreement

RiskAuditAgent.description: Independently stress-tests launch plans, creates the risk register, and monitors mitigation statuses.

expected_outputs.risk_register: Table of legal, security, operational, and reputational risks with owner, severity, and mitigation plan

ProductLocalizationAgent.description: Defines localization scope across UI translation, UX flows, and help documentation.

expected_outputs.localization_spec: Language, UX localizations, and onboarding adaptation list

IntegrationAgent.description: Verifies technical dependencies including regional payments, SMS gateways, identity providers, and SLAs.

expected_outputs.payment_compatibility: Payment processor recommendation (Adyen, local cards, etc.)
expected_outputs.SLA_validation: Latency and uptime projections per region

PricingStrategyAgent.description: Formulates willingness-to-pay models, pricing tiers, and packaging options per region.

expected_outputs.pricing_model: Multi-region pricing tiers and currency rules
expected_outputs.packaging_memo: Packaging tiers, add-ons, and discount policies

FinanceModelingAgent.description: Simulates financial unit economics, gross margins, CAC/LTV, and payback periods.

expected_outputs.unit_economics: Projected gross margins and CAC payback periods

GTMStrategistAgent.description: Establishes persona messaging architecture, channel strategies, budget allocations, and launch timing.

expected_outputs.demand_generation_plan: Channel mix, calendar, and budget allocations

ContentOpsAgent.description: Creates region-specific, localized GTM copywriting and campaign assets.

expected_outputs.localized_assets: Copywriting templates, email sequences, and social assets

SalesEnablementAgent.description: Produces region-specific playbooks, battlecards, and script templates for local sales teams.

PartnershipsAgent.description: Sources, ranks, and coordinates outreach plans for local channel/distributor partners.

HumanApprovalAgent.description: Simulates executive and compliance sign-off at critical gates.

expected_outputs.signoff_comments: Formal go/no-go signoff and executive feedback

LaunchOpsAgent.description: Orchestrates launch runbooks, cross-functional timelines, and customer support readiness checklists.

expected_outputs.launch_runbook: Consolidated launch steps, owners, and timelines
expected_outputs.support_readiness: Knowledge base, SLA mappings, and escalation flows

RevOpsAnalyticsAgent.description: Instruments KPI tracking schemas, builds post-launch dashboards, and conducts 30-day reviews with root-cause analysis.

expected_outputs.kpi_schema: Telemetry configurations for pipeline, conversion, and retention
